{% load i18n %}

{% trans "Leaderboard" %}

{% for entry in leaderboard %}
{% if entry.rank == 1 %}🏆{% else %}{{ entry.rank }}{% endif %} {{ entry.team_name }} {% if entry.is_finished %} 🏁 {% elif entry.station_order %} {% blocktrans with order=entry.station_order %}station {{ order }}{% endblocktrans %} {% endif %}
{{ entry.points }}
{% empty %}

{% trans "No teams yet." %}

{% endfor %}
